basic_details.job_title: KVK Churu Subject Matter Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Krishi Vigyan Kendra Churu (KVK Churu) Subject Matter Specialist/T-6 (Plant Protection) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.churu1.kvk2.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the KVK Churu Subject Matter Specialist/T-6 (Plant Protection) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Agriculture with specialization in Plant Protection from a recognized university, Master’s degree in science/social science relevant to agriculture or equivalent qualification with specialization in Plant Protection
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Agriculture with specialization in Plant Protection from a recognized university. Master’s degree in science/social science relevant to agriculture or equivalent qualification with specialization in Plant Protection may also apply.

salary_details.details: Pay Level-10 (Rs. 15600-39100 + GP Rs. 5400) Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.churu1.kvk2.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download KVK Churu Subject Matter Specialist/T-6 (Plant Protection) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KVK Churu Subject Matter Specialist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the KVK Churu Subject Matter Specialist/T-6 (Plant Protection) recruitment is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in Agriculture with specialization in Plant Protection or an equivalent qualification in a relevant science/social science field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Subject Matter Specialist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in Pay Level-10, ranging from Rs. 15600 to Rs. 39100 per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 5400.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1500/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any relaxation in the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are eligible for relaxation in the application fee as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a written examination, a practical test, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can download the official notification and application form from the official website of KVK Churu, which is www.churu1.kvk2.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as your photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates.
